zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes de Grandison於1289年出生在英國貝德福爾布勒左時，她的父親Sir William de Grandison I34歲，母親Lady Sibyl de Tregoz18歲。她於大約1305年與Sir Thomas Bardolf II在瑞士波格a特爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1357年12月11日在英國林可爾史爾盧斯金頓享年68歲，埋葬在澤西島哥吉拉 沙智。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agnes de Grandison于1289年出生在英国貝德福爾布勒左时，她的父亲Sir William de Grandison I34岁，母亲Lady Sibyl de Tregoz18岁。她于大约1305年与Sir Thomas Bardolf II在瑞士波格a特爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1357年12月11日在英国林可爾史爾盧斯金頓享年68岁，埋葬在泽西岛哥吉拉 沙智。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Grandison
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish (of Norman origin): said to be a habitational name from Granson on Lake Neuchâtel (Switzerland).

History: The first known bearer of this surname is Rigaldus de Grancione (flourished 1040). The name was taken to Britain by Otes de Grandison (died 1328) and his brother. They were among a group of Savoyards who settled in England when Henry III married a granddaughter of the Count of Savoy.

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes de Grandison was born in 1289, in Bletsoe, Bedfordshire, England, her father, Sir William de Grandison I, was 34 and her mother, Lady Sibyl de Tregoz, was 18. She married Sir Thomas Bardolf II about 1305, in Neuchâtel, Neuchâtel, Switzerland. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 11 December 1357, in Ruskington, Lincolnshire, England, at the age of 68, and was buried in All Saints, Jersey.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnes de Grandison est née en 1289, à Bletsoe, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir William de Grandison I, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Lady Sibyl de Tregoz, avait 18 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Thomas Bardolf II environ 1305, à Neuchâtel, Canton de Neuchâtel, Suisse. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 11 décembre 1357, à Ruskington, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 68 ans, et a été enterrée à All Saints, Jersey.

de.lifeSummary: Als Agnes de Grandison 1289 in Bletsoe, Bedfordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir William de Grandison I 34 und ihre Mutter Lady Sibyl de Tregoz 18. Sie hat um 1305 in Neuchâtel, Neuenburg, Schweiz Sir Thomas Bardolf II geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 11. Dezember 1357 im Alter von 68 Jahren in Ruskington, Lincolnshire, England und wurde in All Saints, Jersey begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes de Grandison è nata il nel 1289 nel Bletsoe, Bedfordshire, England, sua padre, Sir William de Grandison I, aveva 34 anni e sua madre, Lady Sibyl de Tregoz, aveva 18 anni. Lei sposato Sir Thomas Bardolf II circa 1305, nel Neuchâtel, Neuchâtel, Svizzera. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 11 dicembre 1357, nel Ruskington, Lincolnshire, England, all'età di 68 anni, e fu sepolta a All Saints, Jersey.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnes de Grandisonが1289年にイギリスベドフォードシュアイアブレトソで生まれた時，父Sir William de Grandison Iは34歳，母Lady Sibyl de Tregozは18歳であった。約1305年にスイスネウエンブルグネウチaテルでSir Thomas Bardolf IIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1357年12月11日にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアルスキントンで68歳で死去し，ジャージーアル サインツにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes de Grandison(이)가 1289년 영국 베드퍼드실르 블레츠에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir William de Grandison I(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Sibyl de Tregoz(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 대략 1305년 스위스 니우버그 니우cha텔에서 Sir Thomas Bardolf II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1357년 12월 11일 영국 링코실르 러스킨그턴에서 68세의 나이로 사망했으며 저지 앨 세인츠에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes de Grandison nasceu em 1289, em Bletsoe, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir William de Grandison I, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Lady Sibyl de Tregoz, tinha 18 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Thomas Bardolf II aproximadamente 1305, em Neuchâtel, Neuenburg, Suiça. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 11 de dezembro de 1357, em Ruskington, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, com 68 anos, e foi sepultada em All Saints, Jérsei.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes de Grandison родилась в 1289 г. в местности блецо, бедфордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir William de Grandison I было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Sibyl de Tregoz, 18. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Thomas Bardolf II около 1305 г. в местности неучaтел, неуенбург, Швейцария. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла 11 декабря 1357 г. в местности рускингтон, линколншир, Англия в возрасте 68 лет и была похоронена в местности алл сеинц, Джерси.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Agnes de Grandison nació en 1289, en Bletsoe, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir William de Grandison I, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Lady Sibyl de Tregoz, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Sir Thomas Bardolf II aproximadamente 1305, en Neuchâtel, Neuenburg, Suiza. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 11 de diciembre de 1357, en Ruskington, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 68 años, y fue sepultada en All Saints, Jersey.
